info.name: LeanStock API (Complete)
info.description:
Complete Postman collection with all available LeanStock API endpoints.

Base URL: http://localhost:3000

Features:
- Authentication with JWT tokens
- Full CRUD for Products, Inventory, Locations, Suppliers
- Transfer and Purchase Order workflows
- Supplier Returns management
- Notifications and Audit Logs
- Analytics (Super Admin only)
- System Settings (Super Admin only)

request.description:
Request: GET /health
Method: GET
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/health
Purpose: Execute GET {{baseUrl}}/health and return API response.
Request disabled: Public registration is turned off for employee-only system. Use /auth/invite + /auth/register-invite.

Method: POST

Create tenant without admin user.

Request: POST /tenants
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/tenants

Create tenant with admin user. Auto-creates TENANT_ADMIN user and returns invite token.

Request: POST /tenants (with Admin)
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/tenants

Response includes:
- tenant: created tenant object
- admin.email: admin email
- admin.inviteToken: JWT token for registration
- admin.inviteLink: full registration URL

List all reorder points.

Response includes product and location relations.

Get products needing reorder (current stock <= minQuantity).

Query param: lowStock=true

Response includes:
- currentStock, reservedStock
- product details
- reorder point limits

Тест SMTP - отправляет письмо напрямую без очереди. Проверяет настройки Gmail/SendGrid.
Статус очереди email: waiting, active, completed, failed.
Список failed email jobs для диагностики.
